properties.name: feign.services
properties.description: Named third-party API service configurations keyed by service name.

properties.name: feign.services.*.base-url
properties.description: Base URL used by the Feign client and matched by the auth interceptor.

properties.name: feign.services.*.auth.type
properties.description: Authentication type for the service. Supported values are oauth2 and api-key.

properties.name: feign.services.*.auth.method
properties.description: HTTP method used to request OAuth2 tokens. Supported values are post and get.

properties.name: feign.services.*.auth.token-header
properties.description: Header name used to inject OAuth2 access tokens.

properties.name: feign.services.*.auth.header-name
properties.description: Header name used to inject a fixed API key.

properties.name: feign.services.*.auth.value
properties.description: Fixed API key value used when auth.type is api-key.

properties.name: feign.services.*.auth.expire-ahead-seconds
properties.description: Seconds before token expiry when a cached OAuth2 token should be refreshed.

properties.name: feign.services.*.auth.token-field
properties.description: Dot-separated JSON path to extract the access token from the token response, e.g. data.accessToken. When blank, the built-in auto-detection (access_token / accessToken / token) is used.

properties.name: feign.services.*.auth.request-fields.client-id
properties.description: OAuth2 request field name for client id. When not set, defaults to clientId.

properties.name: feign.services.*.auth.request-fields.client-secret
properties.description: OAuth2 request field name for client secret. When not set, defaults to clientSecret.

properties.name: feign.services.*.auth.request-fields.grant-type
properties.description: OAuth2 request field name for grant type. When not set, the grant-type parameter is omitted from the token request.

properties.name: feign.services.*.auth.clients
properties.description: OAuth2 client credentials and optional path prefix routes.

properties.name: feign.services.*.auth.clients[].grant-type
properties.description: OAuth2 grant type value. When not set, the grant-type parameter is omitted from the token request.

properties.name: feign.services.*.auth.clients[].path-prefixes
properties.description: Request path prefixes routed to this OAuth2 client. Omit to define the default client for the service.

properties.name: feign.services.*.auth.path-prefixes
properties.description: Request path prefixes routed to this API key service. Omit to define the fallback API key service for the same base URL.

values.description: Fetch and cache tokens from an OAuth2 token endpoint.
Inject a fixed API key value into the configured header.
